title: September 27
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}
'''September 27''' is the 270th day of the year (271st in leap years), with 95 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1920|1920]] – [[William Conrad]] is born.
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Wilford Brimley]] is born.
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Garrick Hagon]] is born.
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Denis Lawson]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Jim Shooter]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Scott Lawrence]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Indra Ové]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Chris Avellone]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 34|''Star Wars Weekly'' 34]] published.
*[[1986]] – "[[The Raich]]" airs on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 22|''Star Wars'' (1998) 22]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 5]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 10|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 10]] published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Shadow Games]]'' published.
*2011 – [[Riptide (novel)|''Riptide'']] published.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Beta|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Beta]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars: Death Star Battles (2016)|''Star Wars: Death Star Battles'']] [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] reissue edition published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars Art: Ralph McQuarrie]]'' published.
*2016 – ''[[Star Wars: Secrets of the Galaxy Deluxe Boxed Set]]'' published.
*[[2017]] – [[Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu 2|''Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu'' 2]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 36|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 36]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Marty Balin]] dies.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan, Jedi Master]]'' published.
*2022 – ''[[The High Republic: The Fallen Star]]'' published in paperback.
*[[2023]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 36|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 36]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 9|''Hyperspace Stories'' 9]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 4|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 4]] published.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Wild Aklyrr / Lys' Lost Lightsaber]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
